subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou beholdest my abode before Thy presence and my dwelling-place in Thy lands, wherein I find none but Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی تری مقری بین یدیک و مسکنی فی بلادک بحیث لم اجد سواک
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @prayer for spiritual recognition
